generation.style: high quality Korean children's storybook gouache, closed dark-brown contours, broad separated color zones
generation.canvasContract: continuous edge-to-edge storybook scene with no outer frame, mat, white margin, letterbox, text, logo or watermark
generation.brushReadiness: large closed regions for seeded freehand diagonal and vertical brush reveal

characters.nuni: three-round snowman, carrot nose, coal-button eyes, sky-blue knitted scarf, tiny red bucket hat
characters.mina: seven-year-old child, black braided hair, coral winter coat, navy mittens, yellow boots

scenes.description: Mina and Nuni build a snow lantern in the winter garden.
Spring sunlight begins to melt the snow, making Nuni worry.
Nuni quietly worries beside a melting snow patch.
Mina writes a spring letter while Nuni holds flower seeds.
Mina and Nuni plant a neat row of flower seeds.
Nuni's meltwater helps Mina water the growing seeds.
Fresh sprouts rise as Nuni becomes a small snow mound.
Mina ties Nuni's scarf and hat to a garden stake beside sprouts.
The garden blooms into a vivid spring flower celebration.
Flower petals form a gentle symbolic snowman smile above Mina.
